title: Hoesh UK Women Pink 72 Inches Breathable Bridesmaids Long Zip Wedding Gown Dress Travel Storage Garment Cover Bag
features: DESIGN: 24x72 inch length bridesmaid gown bags bridesmaid gown bags allowing for lots of space without crumpling or creasing. This bag is perfect for long flowing bridesmaid or formal prom dresses. The width is 24 inches which means there is no creasing of the garment at the top or bottom of the bag.
MATERIAL: Breathable, lightweight, non woven 80GSM material which is high quality and allows air circulation to help prevent mould and mildew build up which makes it perfect for long term storage.

CLEAR POCKET: Clear document pocket on the left hand side of the cover useful for inserting business cards/customer information. Additionally there is an opening for hangers at the top and a reinforced loop at the bottom so the cover can be folded in half to make carrying it easier.
HIGH QUALITY DETAILS & DURABILITY: Full length high quality zip, reinforced seams and strong loop to help carry the cover when folded over which allows easy transportation.

ECO-FRIENDLY & REUSABLE: The bags are designed to be reusable and limit the need for single use plastic sheets. They are easy to clean and can be simple wiped with a damp cloth or hand washed. The cover will not lose its shape and can be folded and stored away to save space and increase longevity of the product.
description: Product Description ABOUT US Hoesh International began as a small family team supplying garment covers. As the company grew, so did our products and our customer base. Today we supply to all corners of the world with over 3000 customers and a wider range of products to choose from. We have been trading for over 20 years and aim to provide our customers with the best service possible. Based in Leicester, we have over 18,000 square feet of storage facilities and our in-house printing gives our customers a fast and reliable service. Although we have been working on garment protection for numerous years, we thrive to improve our standards. Our bridesmaid dress covers are designed to hold all types of gowns, from the simple lace design to the extravagant embroided pieces. They are the ideal cover for bridesmaid, mother of the bride, prom and evening dresses. Size: 24″ x 60″ inches / 61 x 152 cm & 24″ x 72″ inches / 61 x 182 cm. Available in either waterproof 0.10 mm PEVA or in 80 GSM non - woven material Full length zip available with a loop at the bottom of the cover Clear document pocket on the left hand side Our dress bag covers are the perfect solution for protecting and storing dresses ,makes your wardrobe to look organized and also protects your clothes from colour fading, out of shape and yellowing
